title: Layered 3D Papercraft Anime Hero Poster AI
sourceTitle: Layered 3D Papercraft Anime Hero Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed 3D layered papercraft anime poster featuring original ocean rider hero in teal jacket, red scarf, holding a paper compass, leaping from waves. Subject: original ocean rider hero in teal jacket, red scarf, holding a paper compass, leaping from waves emerges dynamically from intricate paper-cut waves, swirling clouds, floating white fragments, deep shadow box layers, with bold action pose, vibrant character color, and handcrafted collectible-poster presence. Scene: Elegant white paper shadow-box world with Japanese traditional wave or cloud motifs, floating paper fragments, deep relief layers, crisp cardstock textures, and fantasy adventure atmosphere. Composition: vertical poster, dramatic low angle, hero emerging from white layered paper; keep the hero integrated into layered paper depth, with bottom embossed typography TIDE RUNNER, dramatic perspective, and high-dimensional cut-paper structure. Signature Elements: original ocean rider hero in teal jacket, red scarf, holding a paper compass, leaping from waves, intricate paper-cut waves, swirling clouds, floating white fragments, deep shadow box layers, vertical poster, dramatic low angle, hero emerging from white layered paper, bottom title TIDE RUNNER, layered cardstock relief, Japanese wave or cloud ornament, floating fragments, and premium collectible papercraft finish. Style: Premium handcrafted paper sculpture aesthetic, deep dimensional cut-paper artwork, anime adventure poster energy, intricate laser-cut detail, cinematic lighting, and museum-quality luxury wall-art finish. Color Palette: Elegant white paper base, deep shadow relief, vibrant hero colors, subtle warm cinematic highlights, and controlled accent tones from the paper environment. Lighting: Cinematic studio lighting across layered paper edges, strong relief shadows, bright hero highlights, and crisp depth separation between cardstock layers. Camera: Poster-grade vertical camera with dramatic perspective, clear hero silhouette, readable relief layers, and balanced collectible-art framing. Materials: Layered cardstock, paper-cut waves or clouds, embossed lettering, floating paper fragments, crisp cut edges, handcrafted paper texture, and shadow-box relief. Typography: TIDE RUNNER appears at the bottom as highly detailed embossed lettering, readable and integrated into the papercraft poster base. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed 3D layered papercraft anime poster featuring original cloud archer heroine in saffron cloak and indigo boots, drawing a paper bow. Subject: original cloud archer heroine in saffron cloak and indigo boots, drawing a paper bow emerges dynamically from layered clouds, cranes, mountain cutouts, wind ribbons, white cardstock relief, with bold action pose, vibrant character color, and handcrafted collectible-poster presence. Scene: Elegant white paper shadow-box world with Japanese traditional wave or cloud motifs, floating paper fragments, deep relief layers, crisp cardstock textures, and fantasy adventure atmosphere. Composition: vertical poster, central diagonal action pose, deep relief on white paper; keep the hero integrated into layered paper depth, with bottom embossed typography SKY ARROW, dramatic perspective, and high-dimensional cut-paper structure. Signature Elements: original cloud archer heroine in saffron cloak and indigo boots, drawing a paper bow, layered clouds, cranes, mountain cutouts, wind ribbons, white cardstock relief, vertical poster, central diagonal action pose, deep relief on white paper, bottom title SKY ARROW, layered cardstock relief, Japanese wave or cloud ornament, floating fragments, and premium collectible papercraft finish. Color Palette: Elegant white paper base, deep shadow relief, vibrant hero colors, subtle warm cinematic highlights, and controlled accent tones from the paper environment. Lighting: Cinematic studio lighting across layered paper edges, strong relief shadows, bright hero highlights, and crisp depth separation between cardstock layers. Camera: Poster-grade vertical camera with dramatic perspective, clear hero silhouette, readable relief layers, and balanced collectible-art framing. Materials: Layered cardstock, paper-cut waves or clouds, embossed lettering, floating paper fragments, crisp cut edges, handcrafted paper texture, and shadow-box relief. Typography: SKY ARROW appears at the bottom as highly detailed embossed lettering, readable and integrated into the papercraft poster base. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
